marketing.headline: Find stock setups faster
marketing.lead: Scan thousands of US and Tel Aviv stocks using precomputed indicators, Bollinger proximity, moving averages, and custom sequence logic.
marketing.microcopy: No need to open charts one by one. Build a screen, run it, and find matching stocks in seconds.

universe.label: Two market universes in one workflow

preview.title: Scan thousands of stocks in seconds
preview.body: Choose your filters, run a scan, and instantly surface stocks that match your setup without opening charts one by one.
preview.scanHint: Precomputed indicators remove the wait from each scan request.
preview.savedScreenTitle: Save the screen and reuse it later
preview.savedScreenBody: Turn a good filter mix into a repeatable strategy instead of rebuilding the same scan every morning.

features.title: Faster than checking charts one by one
features.body: Stock Scanner is built to narrow the market down to the handful of names worth your attention right now.

ma.title: Moving averages
ma.desc: Instantly find stocks trading above or below key moving averages, so you can identify trend continuation, pullback, and recovery setups faster.

bb.title: Bollinger proximity
bb.desc: Spot stocks stretched toward the upper band or pulling back near the lower band, helping you find possible extension and mean-reversion opportunities.

seq.title: Sequence engine
seq.desc: Detect custom sequence breaks and strong buy or sell contexts automatically instead of reviewing each chart candle by candle.

save.title: Saved screens
save.desc: Save your favorite scan setups and rerun them anytime without rebuilding the same filter stack from scratch.

alerts.title: Alert-ready workflows
alerts.desc: Prepare saved screens for future notifications when a new stock enters one of your tracked setups.

speed.title: Precomputed speed
speed.desc: Indicators are already calculated in the database, so the heavy work is done before you click Run Scan.

saved.title: Save your strategy. Let the scanner watch for new matches.
saved.body: Build a screen once, save it, and rerun it whenever you want. Later, alerts can notify you when a new stock enters one of your saved screens.

bullets.track: Track new stocks that enter a saved setup
bullets.premium: Prepare the foundation for email alerts and premium notifications

mock.label: New match
mock.title: AMD entered your "Pullback near SMA 50" screen
mock.body: This is the kind of saved-screen workflow that turns a manual habit into a repeatable alert-ready process.

finalCta.title: Ready to find your next setup?
finalCta.body: Start scanning with precomputed indicators, saved screens, and a workflow designed for traders who want answers fast.

premium.gateBodyLogin: Sign in with the account linked to your membership to run scans and load ticker data.
premium.gateBodyMultiFilterLogin: Guest access includes one screener filter at a time. Sign in to run multi-filter scans, save favorites, and build cleaner setups faster.
premium.gateBodySubscribe: Market scans, the full filter set, and ticker detail data are reserved for active members. Upgrade your plan to unlock everything.
premium.planHintOpen: All market features are open on this deployment.
premium.planHintPaid: Premium and active demo users can access all market data. Essential users can run scans and save screens.

auth.planHelp: Choose the plan you want before creating your account.

premium.title: Premium
premium.body: Full access to all market data, screens, saved scans, and future premium features.

essential.title: Essential
essential.body: Run any screener scan you want and save your scans for later.

demo.title: Demo
demo.body: Full access for 30 days, then the account falls back to free access.

screener.title: Stock Screener
screener.premiumSubtitle: Member workspace — build daily, weekly, and monthly rules against our precomputed snapshot store.
screener.saveScanEmpty: Choose at least one filter before saving a scan.

favorite.empty: Save a filter first, then use the star to load it later.
favorite.emptySave: Choose at least one filter before saving a favorite.
favorite.signInRequired: Sign in to save a favorite filter.

legalNotice.title: Important legal notice
legalNotice.body: This screener is for informational use only and does not provide investment advice. You are solely responsible for any decisions or trades made using this platform. Read the full

ruleBuilder.title: Rule builder
ruleBuilder.subtitle: Add timeframe-aware rules. All rules are combined with AND.
ruleBuilder.empty: No rules yet. Add your first daily, weekly, or monthly rule.

rules.down_sequence_broke_in_strong_up_context: Down sequence broke in strong up context
rules.up_sequence_broke_in_strong_down_context: Up sequence broke in strong down context

tooltips.buy_signal: A bullish break signal fires when a down sequence fails on the latest candle. It marks a sequence-failure event, not a guarantee of trend reversal.
tooltips.sell_signal: A bearish break signal fires when an up sequence fails on the latest candle. It marks a sequence-failure event, not a guarantee of trend reversal.
tooltips.strong_buy_signal: A strong bullish break is a bullish break with stronger candle-body confirmation and close strength relative to the completed down sequence.
tooltips.strong_sell_signal: A strong bearish break would be the bearish mirror signal. It is kept for model symmetry even if it appears less often.
tooltips.bullish_sequence_active: The current candles still satisfy the up-sequence rules.
tooltips.bearish_sequence_active: The current candles still satisfy the down-sequence rules.
tooltips.down_sequence_broke_recently: A down sequence failed within the recent-candle threshold. This is a sequence event, not a standalone reversal call.
tooltips.up_sequence_broke_recently: An up sequence failed within the recent-candle threshold. This is a sequence event, not a standalone reversal call.

seq.downBreakStrongUp: Down seq broke in strong up context
seq.upBreakStrongDown: Up seq broke in strong down context

chart.screenerStudiesHint: Added {count} matching indicator(s) from your active filters to the TradingView chart.
chart.sequenceFiltersHint: Your filters include our custom sequence logic. TradingView cannot reproduce that exactly—use the indicator cards below to confirm sequence and signals.
chart.screenerGenericHint: Open the indicators menu in TradingView to explore tools that align with your filters.
chart.appDataCaption: Daily bars from your account database (same source as the screener).

lookup.title: Stock lookup
lookup.subtitle: Search by ticker prefix (letters, numbers, dot, hyphen). See which chart indicators and screener filters are meaningful for the latest snapshot.
lookup.invalidPrefix: Only letters, digits, dot (.), and hyphen (-) are allowed.
lookup.notFound: No snapshot for this symbol yet. Run the refresh job after it is in your universe.
lookup.meta: {market} · {bars} daily bars in DB · last bar {date}
lookup.filtersHint: “Supported” means the underlying snapshot value exists so the filter can run meaningfully. Boolean signal filters are supported whenever a snapshot row exists.

reason.noSnapshot: No snapshot row for this symbol.
reason.smaMissing: SMA not computed on the latest bar (often insufficient clean history).
reason.notEnoughBars: Roughly {period}+ trading days of history are needed; the database has {bars} bars for this symbol.
reason.emaMissing: EMA 20 is missing on the latest bar.
reason.breakBarsMissing: Break “bars ago” field is null, so numeric break filters are ambiguous.

filterLabels.down_sequence_broke_in_strong_up_context: Down seq. broke in strong up context
filterLabels.up_sequence_broke_in_strong_down_context: Up seq. broke in strong down context

savedScreens.title: Saved Screens
savedScreens.subtitle: Reopen saved scans and manage future scan alerts from one place.
savedScreens.alertsComingSoon: Alerts for new stocks entering this scan will be added in a future update.
savedScreens.alertsPremiumHint: New-entry alerts are planned as a Premium feature and are still disabled for now.

footer.disclaimer: Stock Scanner provides market data, filters, and technical analysis tools for educational and informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
footer.educationalOnly: Use this platform as a research tool, not as a promise of performance or a substitute for independent judgment.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page explains how Stock Scanner handles account information and product usage data.

data.title: What we store
data.body: We store the account data needed to operate the product, including login details managed by Supabase, user preferences, saved screens, and membership entitlements.

usage.title: How product data is used
usage.body: Saved screens, favorites, and related account data are used only to deliver the features you request inside your own account experience.

sharing.title: Sharing and disclosure
sharing.body: We do not treat your saved screens or personal account data as shared community content by default. Access is restricted to the authenticated user and system operators as required to run the service.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: Stock Scanner is a technical market research tool. It does not provide investment advice or brokerage services.

education.title: Educational and informational use
education.body: Market data, indicators, saved screens, and lookup results are provided to help you research setups more efficiently.

responsibility.title: User responsibility
responsibility.body: You remain fully responsible for all decisions, trades, compliance obligations, and risk management choices made using information from this platform.

noGuarantee.title: No guarantee
noGuarantee.body: Signals, filters, and screen results do not guarantee performance, timing, or profitability. Always verify market conditions independently before acting.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For account or product questions, contact the Stock Scanner team using the address below.
contact.emailFallback: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_PREMIUM_CONTACT_EMAIL to show your public support address here.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.accept: I accept the Terms of Use
terms.mustAccept: You must accept the Terms of Use to continue
terms.summaryBody: Stock Scanner is an informational software tool only. It does not provide investment, legal, tax, or brokerage advice. You are solely responsible for your decisions, trades, risk management, compliance obligations, and any losses that result from using the platform.
terms.intro: By accessing or using Stock Scanner, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.

eligibility.title: Eligibility and Account Use
eligibility.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and for all activity that occurs under it. You may use the platform only in compliance with applicable laws, regulations, and exchange or broker restrictions that apply to you.

informationOnly.title: Informational Use Only
informationOnly.body: The platform provides screening tools, market data, calculations, charts, and other output for informational and educational purposes only. All content is general in nature and is not tailored to your financial situation, objectives, or risk tolerance.

noAdvice.title: No Investment or Professional Advice
noAdvice.body: Nothing on the platform constitutes investment advice, a recommendation, solicitation, portfolio management service, brokerage service, legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice, or any fiduciary relationship. No statement on the platform should be interpreted as advice to buy, sell, hold, or avoid any security or strategy.

userResponsibility.title: User Responsibility
userResponsibility.body: You are solely responsible for your research, judgment, orders, execution decisions, compliance, suitability analysis, and risk management. You accept full responsibility for verifying any information before acting on it and for all gains, losses, liabilities, taxes, and consequences arising from your use of the platform.

dataAvailability.title: Data, Accuracy, and Availability
dataAvailability.body: Market data, calculations, and platform output may be delayed, incomplete, inaccurate, unavailable, or interrupted. We do not guarantee accuracy, completeness, timeliness, availability, or fitness for any particular purpose. The platform is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the platform owner, operator, affiliates, and service providers are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, special, exemplary, regulatory, or financial damages, trading losses, lost profits, lost opportunities, data loss, or claims arising out of or related to your use of or inability to use the platform.

indemnity.title: Indemnification
indemnity.body: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the platform owner, operator, affiliates, and service providers from and against claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, and expenses, including reasonable legal fees, arising out of your use of the platform, your violation of these terms, or your violation of any law, regulation, or third-party right.

changes.title: Changes to the Terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after updated terms become effective constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
